median_overhead_pct.description: Median percentage token overhead vs. a no-protocol baseline turn on the same task

conformance_rate.description: Fraction of turns where envelope passed JSONSchema validation after the re-prompt loop

bytes_on_wire.description: Encoded envelope byte length for the strategy on the canonical fixture (added by the §2 overhead harness).

tokens_envelope.description: Chars/4 token approximation of the encoded envelope payload.

parse_time_ns.description: Wall-clock nanoseconds for one decode pass back into a typed Envelope.

rolling_median.description: Rolling 7-day median of median_overhead_pct, populated by the nightly job from the prior week's runs. Used by the regression check (>10% drift fails the job).

window_days.description: Number of days the median was computed over.

value.description: Median value of median_overhead_pct across the window.

samples.description: Number of data points contributing to the median.
